entries.summary: JAR editorial policy confirmed BIMODAL (supersedes UF-203-1 single-criterion framing)
entries.context: Two distinct JAR rejections same operator-update batch 2026-05-12: (a) substantiality >=~1000 lines (Item 21); (b) zero sorry beyond named axiom (Item 18). Either failure independently triggers rejection.
implications: L2 N2 strategy: L2.4 hypothesized milestone = L2.3 + line-count >=~1000
Tunnell CNP 3-venue rejected (FAC defunct + JAR 2x substantiality + AFM)
Cross-venue caveat: substantiality thresholds are venue-specific, NOT community norms
AAR candidacy elevated to TIER 1 alternative
entries.memory_fact: JAR editorial policy is BIMODAL: (a) substantiality threshold (~1000 lines); (b) zero sorry beyond named axiom. Both required; either failure triggers rejection.

entries.summary: Operator-initiated-withdraw is a distinct disposition class not previously represented

implications: arXiv-endorsement quest elevated from background to ACTIVE blocker
Portfolio-wide policy survey needed for in-flight venue arXiv-required status
